description: Near-miss probe (issue #183, docs/evaluation.md D1 near-miss set): counterparty reaffirms general non-employment status of Students without using any of 'no-student-employment-status's trigger phrases ('co-employment', 'co-employer', 'joint employer', 'joint employment'). Must ACCEPT with zero fires.

must_not_flag.reason: Reaffirming that Students are not employees is standard boilerplate and contains none of the rule's trigger_terms; it must not fire.

planted_variation.inserted_hunk: The parties reaffirm that Students are not employees, agents, contractors, or representatives of the Company for any purpose under this Agreement.
planted_variation.notes: Near-miss: general non-employment reaffirmation; deliberately avoids the literal trigger phrases 'co-employment'/'co-employer'/'joint employer'/'joint employment'.

detector_expectation.rationale: Hunk contains none of trigger_terms ['co-employment', 'co-employer', 'joint employer', 'joint employment'].

authorship_note: AFK-drafted per issue #183 (owner-approved synthetic scaffold, 2026-07-10): fully invented, no real-world contract text, no de-identification required. Marked synthetic and pending GC sign-off; not production-qualified until Legal/GC reviews and approves.
